valid.name: operator-default

invalid.name: cast-to-operator
operator-to-cast
invalid.code:
SELECT x::integer FROM t;
SELECT x::numeric(10, 2) FROM t;

errors.message: Use `CAST(<expr> AS type)` instead of the `::` operator.
Use `CAST(<expr> AS type)` instead of the `::` operator.

invalid.output:
SELECT CAST(x AS integer) FROM t;
SELECT CAST(x AS numeric(10, 2)) FROM t;
